refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation, task scheduling, and resource allocation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency, task scheduling, resource allocation) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations; verify that each sub-FR contributes to meeting or exceeding the productivity target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation efficiency to maximize output per hour.
FR2: Schedule tasks effectively to minimize idle time and maximize utilization.
FR3: Allocate resources dynamically to support continuous productivity.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to improve operation efficiency.
DP2: Intelligent task scheduling system to optimize work sequences.
DP3: Dynamic resource management framework to allocate assets in real-time.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to improve operation efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from task scheduling and resource allocation but requires telemetry input; interfaces are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Risk of suboptimal performance if vehicle control algorithms are not adaptive to varying conditions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating task scheduling and resource allocation DPs in subsequent decomposition levels to manage coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time sensor and status data from vehicle subsystems.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands and schedules from higher-level systems.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with other modules and remote operators.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control DP; low diffusion as control logic is centralized.
Broader scope; less focused containment for vehicle control DP.
Primarily for remote control; less suitable for vehicle control DP.
Safety focus; not appropriate for vehicle control DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module best encapsulates the vehicle control DP with minimal diffusion and clear interface boundaries.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
Risk of telemetry data latency affecting control performance.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions and telemetry data handling to mitigate latency and integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (advanced vehicle control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR (optimize equipment operation efficiency) with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion observed; control logic centralized in Vehicle module.
Potential risk in telemetry interface latency.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of DP with well-defined external interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data analysis and productivity measurements during operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with minimal ambiguity.

recommended_revisions: Further decompose remaining sub-FRs (task scheduling, resource allocation) in next levels.
Refine telemetry interface specifications to ensure low latency and reliability.

decision.justification: The current level decomposition and assignments are sound; next step is to decompose remaining sub-FRs and refine DPs and IMs accordingly.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Schedule tasks effectively to minimize idle time and maximize utilization.
FR3: Allocate resources dynamically to support continuous productivity.

revise.why: To decompose remaining productivity-related functional requirements for comprehensive coverage.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Vehicle control algorithms can be effectively implemented within the Vehicle module.
open_risks: Integration complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
evidence_needed: Performance validation of vehicle control algorithms in representative scenarios.
